9:45AM COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT.KENNETH MCDOWELL.SUSAN KIM SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBIT A, RENTAL LEASE, DATED 3-3-94, MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. EXHIBIT B, THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT, DATED 3-7-95, MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. EXHIBIT C, SUMMON DATED 3-16-95, MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS, JAMES S.
